narrative:
Brown Twp township has 4,717 registered voters, with 55.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.5%, a clear Republican lean of 11.0 percentage points.
